ontology_metadata.description: Medical terminology mapped to standard billing categories

categories.name: Room Rent
categories.description: Daily charges for occupying a hospital room or bed.

categories.name: Medicine
categories.description: Cost of medicines consumed during treatment.

categories.name: Consultation
categories.description: Fees charged by doctors for visiting and treating the patient.

categories.name: Diagnostics
categories.description: Tests required to diagnose the condition.

categories.name: Miscellaneous
categories.description: Other overhead administrative charges. Usually not covered.
